mapper.insert: insert into activity_inventory ( activity_id, goods_id, total_stock, reserved_stock, sold_stock, version, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{activityId}, #{goodsId}, #{totalStock}, #{reservedStock}, #{soldStock}, #{version}, now(), now() )
mapper.update: update activity_inventory SET reserved_stock = reserved_stock + 1 WHERE goods_id = #{GoodsId} AND (total_stock - reserved_stock - sold_stock) > 0

update activity_inventory SET reserved_stock = reserved_stock - 1, -- 从“预留”中减去 sold_stock = sold_stock + 1, -- 增加到“已售” update_time = NOW() WHERE goods_id = #{GoodsId} AND reserved_stock > 0 -- 前提条件：必须有预留库存可扣
update activity_inventory SET reserved_stock = reserved_stock - 1, -- 释放预留 update_time = NOW() WHERE goods_id = #{GoodsId} AND reserved_stock > 0 -- 前提条件：必须有预留库存可释放
update activity_inventory SET sold_stock = sold_stock - 1, -- 从“已售”中减去 update_time = NOW() WHERE goods_id = #{GoodsId} AND sold_stock > 0 -- 前提条件：必须有已售库存可退
update activity_inventory set total_stock = #{totalStock}, update_time = now() where goods_id = #{goodsId}
